The classic shape of the heating bottle filled with natural peat mixture guarantees temperature retention for several times longer than classic water-filled thermophores. Thanks to its easy preparation and application, it is especially suitable for home use. The peat pillow includes a textile cover made of 100% cotton, which prevents initial thermal shock. After heating to the desired temperature (50 - 60°C), it is recommended to test the temperature by touch before applying the pad to the affected area. items.raw_desc: Oktató játék Verk 01964 Fogászati implantátum modell, fehér:The life-size transparent folding jaw model Verk 01964 allows you to observe the roots of the teeth. The healthy side shows normal teeth and occlusion. The other side shows several pathologies: supraeruption, atypical alveolar abscess with caries, periodontal disease, lateral abscess, abfraction, irregular curvature of the tooth, retinated toe, Erosion, tooth fracture, Horizontal Impaction, root inflammation of the dental pulp, root canal with crown, internal resorption, a worn tooth, external resorption of the root, implants and root fracture. The tooth model was developed specifically for dental school programs to give students an understanding of dental implant processes, pathologies and repair techniques, implants and experience. The removable teeth, which can be conveniently removed and erected, show people the clearly detailed tooth structure. items.raw_desc: Csepegtetős kávé Drip it kávé szűrőben Mix Colombia, Honduras 20 × 10 g:Káva ve filtru Drip it Mix Colombia, Honduras20× 10 g                Kávu ve filtru Drip it Mix Colombia, Honduras si velmi snadno připravíte téměř kdekoli. Stačí vám hrnek a horká voda. Jednoduše utrhnete horní část filtru, nasadíte filtr s kávou na hrnek a postupně nalijete přibližně 175 ml horké vody. Jakmile káva překape do hrnku, je připravená ke konzumaci. Káva Drip it je tak ideální i na cesty. Umožní vám připravit si lahodnou filtrovanou kávu.    Sada Drip it Mix Colombia, Honduras obsahuje dvě středně pražené kávy. Káva Colombia Sierra Nevada nabízí výraznou chuť s tóny tmavé čokolády, karamelu a jablka, zatímco v chuťově vyvážené kávě Honduras Las Capucas ucítíte sladké tóny karamelu, medu a lískového oříšku. Kávy ve filtru Drip it Mix jsou tvořené 100% výběrovou Arabikou. Kávová zrna se praží v české pražírně v Kostelci nad Labem. Před mletím káva týden odpočívá, díky čemuž se rozvine její vůně i chuť. Následně se pomele a uloží do filtru. Každý filtr je balený...

items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Boldog lazac:                An addictive game you'll want to play all the timeHappy Salmon is a fast and loud movement game that will have you laughing in less than two minutes. This game with simple rules is designed for the whole family and is great as a fun game for kids, school trips, camps, but also as a party game for adults. Players turn over their card, shout out what is on it and try to find the opponent whose card shows the same picture as quickly as possible. Once they find it, they must perform the action shown, then they can put the card down and continue playing. The object of the game is to get rid of all your cards first.  As a challenge, it is also possible to try the TICHOU variant of the Lucky Salmon game. One game of this game lasts only 90 seconds.
